summary: This lesson explains how to use custom regex in Google Search Console to identify specific types of keywords for improving content rank position. It covers filtering by query, identifying question queries and long-tail keywords, and finding buyer intent terms to enhance e-commerce sales.
key_points: use custom regex in search console
